MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Megan Johnson; 415-969-6973; Wolford Wayne LLP; appearing in person for plaintiff.
Sapphira Davis; 415-622-7004; Heath & Yuen, APC; appearing via Zoom for defendant.

Ms. Davis contests the courts tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 655 POWELL I5, LP AND GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Moving party fails to carry their burden and show that the negligence claim arises out of protected activity. No authority is cited for the propositions that "removal" or a single tenant by a private landlord is an issue of public interest or that "the right to not file a petition" is a protected activity under CCP 425.16. The court does not find this motion frivolous or solely intended to cause unnecessary delay.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
